svg.text: Anatomy of a cuga-app — paper_scout, end to end
Static structure (top) + live request flow (bottom). Pattern is identical across the other 23 apps.

g.text: # AGENT_SETTING_CONFIG → settings.<provider>.toml (set in make_agent before import)
All tools return {ok, data} envelopes. No keys required — public APIs.

svg.text: REQUEST FLOW — USER ASKS "Find recent RAG papers"

g.text: ↻ ReAct loop: more tool calls until satisfied (steps 4–8 repeat)
Key takeaways — why this pattern scales to 24 apps

svg.text: Same flow holds across all 24 apps. Mixed-mode apps add inline @tool defs alongside load_tools — see smart_todo, deck_forge, api_doc_gen.
